query: SELECT f.id, f.student_id, f.mentor_id, f.rating, f.comment, u.name as student_name, m.name as mentor_name FROM feedbacks f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users m ON f.mentor_id = m.id LIMIT 10;
